description: Canonical policy for source_dictionary acquisitionRoutes.sources fields. Shared by equipment import, display audit, and UI.

sourcesFields.source: Import phase label or research origin (e.g. Phase L-8c head gear batch import, L-1a pilot). May be English.
sourcesFields.method: Display routeType aligned with category2 (e.g. 零式, クラフト, その他). MUST NOT store English provenance text.
sourcesFields.decision: Human-readable adoption rationale and research provenance (e.g. Gamer Escape item page, IL tier note).
